mano_cua.result_summary: 部署失败：pump.io是后端社交网络服务器，需要Node 4-6（engines: >=4 <7）+ 数据库后端。Node 6无法在Apple Silicon(ARM)上运行（Bad CPU type in executable）。任务卡deploy_commands（npm run dev）不正确，实际启动方式是./bin/pump且需要数据库配置。无法在当前环境部署。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: pump.io requires Node 4-6 which only has x86 binaries, cannot run on Apple Silicon. It's also a full server-side rendered app needing MongoDB/DataBank configuration, not a simple frontend project.
